zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan FitzRandolph於大約1250年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾米德勒哈姆時，她的父親Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham34歲，母親Anastasia de Percy35歲。她和Robert Tattershall至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1310年4月1日之前在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan FitzRandolph于大约1250年出生在英国英格兰越可爾米德勒哈姆时，她的父亲Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham34岁，母亲Anastasia de Percy35岁。她和Robert Tattershall至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1310年4月1日之前在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan FitzRandolph was born about 1250, in Middleham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham, was 34 and her mother, Anastasia de Percy, was 35. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Robert Tattershall. She died before 1 April 1310, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan FitzRandolph est née environ 1250, à Middleham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Anastasia de Percy, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Robert Tattershall. Elle est décédée avant 1 avril 1310, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan FitzRandolph um 1250 in Middleham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham 34 und ihre Mutter Anastasia de Percy 35. Sie hatte mit Robert Tattershall mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1. April 1310 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan FitzRandolph è nata il circa 1250 nel Middleham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Anastasia de Percy, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Robert Tattershall. Morì prima del 1 aprile 1310, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan FitzRandolphが約1250年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレハムで生まれた時，父Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middlehamは34歳，母Anastasia de Percyは35歳であった。彼女はRobert Tattershallとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1310年4月1日以前にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan FitzRandolph(이)가 대략 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 미들레함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anastasia de Percy(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Robert Tattershall(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 4월 1일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan FitzRandolph родилась около 1250 г. в местности миддлэам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Anastasia de Percy, 35.
